languages.text: If the character has bionic eyes installed, then their first single attack in the turn automatically scores a critical hit and deals +50% more critical damage.

traits.locale_text: If the character has bionic eyes installed, then their first single attack in the turn automatically scores a critical hit and deals +50% more critical damage.

languages.text: Each {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the first single attack the user makes scores a {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g} and deals +50% more critical damage if the user has an {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}augment{/g} in their optical insertion.
languages.original_text: If the character has bionic eyes installed, then their first single attack in the turn automatically scores a critical hit and deals +50% more critical damage.

traits.locale_text: Each turn, the first single attack made by the user scores a critical hit and deals +50% more critical damage if the user has an augment in the optical insertion.

Each {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the first single attack the user makes scores a {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g} and deals +50% more critical damage if the user has an {g|Encyclopedia:Augment}augment{/g} in their optical insertion.
Each turn, the first single attack the user makes scores a critical hit and deals +50% more critical damage if the user has an augment in their optical insertion.

Each {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the first single attack the user makes scores a {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g} and deals +50% more critical damage if the user has an {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}augment{/g} in their optical insertion.

languages.text: Если у персонажа есть {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}аугмент{/g} в оптической инсерции, то своей первой одиночной атакой за {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ход{/g} он совершает {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}критическое попадание{/g} и наносит на 50% больше критического урона.
languages.original_text: Each {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the first single attack the user makes scores a {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g} and deals +50% more critical damage if the user has an {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}augment{/g} in their optical insertion.

traits.locale_text: Если у персонажа есть {g|Encyclopedia:Augment}аугмент{/g} в оптической инсерции, то своей первой одиночной атакой за {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ход{/g} он совершает {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}критическое попадание{/g} и наносит на 50% больше критического урона.

Если у персонажа есть {g|Encyclopedia:Augment}аугмент{/g} в оптической инсерции, то своей первой одиночной атакой за {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ход{/g} он совершает {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}критическое попадание{/g} и наносит на 50% больше критического урона.

languages.text: Bei jedem {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zug{/g} verursacht der erste Einzelangriff des Nutzers einen {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}kritischen Treffer{/g} und verursacht +50 % mehr kritischen Schaden, wenn der Nutzer eine {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}Augmentation{/g} in seinem optischen Einsatz hat.
languages.original_text: Each {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the first single attack the user makes scores a {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g} and deals +50% more critical damage if the user has an {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}augment{/g} in their optical insertion.

traits.locale_text: Bei jedem {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zug{/g} verursacht der erste Einzelangriff des Nutzers einen {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}kritischen Treffer{/g} und verursacht +50 % mehr kritischen Schaden, wenn der Nutzer eine {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}Augmentation{/g} in seinem optischen Einsatz hat.

languages.text: Cada {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g}, el primer ataque individual del usuario es un {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}impacto crítico{/g} e inflige un +50 % más de daño crítico si el usuario tiene un {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}aumento{/g} en su injerto óptico.
languages.original_text: Each {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the first single attack the user makes scores a {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g} and deals +50% more critical damage if the user has an {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}augment{/g} in their optical insertion.

traits.locale_text: Cada {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g}, el primer ataque individual del usuario es un {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}impacto crítico{/g} e inflige un +50 % más de daño crítico si el usuario tiene un {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}aumento{/g} en su injerto óptico.

languages.text: Kullanıcının optikal eklenti yuvasında bir {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}ogment{/g} takılıysa her {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turda{/g} kullanıcının yapacağı ilk tek saldırı, {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}kritik vuruş{/g} indirir ve +%50 daha fazla kritik hasar verir.
languages.original_text: Each {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the first single attack the user makes scores a {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g} and deals +50% more critical damage if the user has an {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}augment{/g} in their optical insertion.

traits.locale_text: Kullanıcının optikal eklenti yuvasında bir {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}ogment{/g} takılıysa her {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turda{/g} kullanıcının yapacağı ilk tek saldırı, {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}kritik vuruş{/g} indirir ve +%50 daha fazla kritik hasar verir.

languages.text: 若使用者在光学植入槽位拥有{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}植入物{/g}，每{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}内，使用者的第一次单体攻击必定造成{g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}暴击{/g}，且暴击伤害提高50%。
languages.original_text: Each {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the first single attack the user makes scores a {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g} and deals +50% more critical damage if the user has an {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}augment{/g} in their optical insertion.

traits.locale_text: 若使用者在光学植入槽位拥有{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}植入物{/g}，每{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}内，使用者的第一次单体攻击必定造成{g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}暴击{/g}，且暴击伤害提高50%。

languages.text: À chaque {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}, la première attaque ponctuelle de l'utilisateur assène un {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}coup critique{/g} et inflige +50 % de dégâts critiques supplémentaires si l'utilisateur a une {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}augmentation{/g} dans son insertion optique.
languages.original_text: Each {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the first single attack the user makes scores a {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g} and deals +50% more critical damage if the user has an {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}augment{/g} in their optical insertion.

traits.locale_text: À chaque {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}, la première attaque ponctuelle de l'utilisateur assène un {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}coup critique{/g} et inflige +50 % de dégâts critiques supplémentaires si l'utilisateur a une {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}augmentation{/g} dans son insertion optique.

languages.text: 各{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}、使用者が光学挿入部に{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}オーグメティック{/g}を持っている場合、その使用者が行う最初の単体攻撃は{g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}クリティカルヒット{/g}となり、クリティカルダメージが+50%増加する。

traits.locale_text: 各{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}、使用者が光学挿入部に{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}オーグメティック{/g}を持っている場合、その使用者が行う最初の単体攻撃は{g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}クリティカルヒット{/g}となり、クリティカルダメージが+50%増加する。
